response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Intro audio requires 100% manual transcription (English dialogue). Song lyrics phonetically match the provided JSON reference for 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE'. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the reference JSON for the song segment while manually transcribing the conversational intro and outro. 3. Timing & Pacing: Anchored all subtitles to vocal triggers. Applied aggressive truncation during the rapid play-fighting segment (00:46-01:02) and instantaneous transitions for the song to prevent cascading delays. Included visual text for the network intro and song credits.

subtitles.original: You're making so much noise!

subtitles.english: Why did you change your mind?

subtitles.original: 50 lunges? Oh... oh your knee hurts?
subtitles.english: 50 lunges? Oh... oh your knee hurts?

subtitles.english: Did you get hit by a car?

subtitles.english: I got hit by a car 200 years ago.

subtitles.original: Okay. I guess that's just how it is.

subtitles.original: You know what, Gigi Murin...
subtitles.english: You know what, Gigi Murin...

subtitles.original: Don't touch me! Stop touching me!
subtitles.english: Don't touch me! Stop touching me!

subtitles.original: Stop touching me!
subtitles.english: Stop touching me!

subtitles.original: What? Oh my god! You always do this!
subtitles.english: What? Oh my god! You always do this!

subtitles.english: Why are you always fighting with me?

subtitles.original: Like this! Oh you want to fight?
subtitles.english: Like this! Oh you want to fight?

subtitles.english: I hate you so much! I'll take your hair!

subtitles.original: Hey hey hey hey... Sorry, sorry, sorry, sorry.
subtitles.english: Hey hey hey hey... Sorry, sorry, sorry, sorry.

subtitles.english: I was getting mean. I was acting out.

subtitles.english: Will you forgive me?

subtitles.english: I'm sorry for yelling. I'm sorry for yelling at you.

subtitles.english: I didn't mean to.

subtitles.english: Can you kiss my knee please?

subtitles.original: I guess... oh, I feel really good now.
subtitles.english: I guess... oh, I feel really good now.

subtitles.english: Do you feel better?

subtitles.english: Please, please don't go to bed without me!

subtitles.original: It does. Oh, I feel so comfortable.

subtitles.original: 延々続行ルララMiracle Sing Time
subtitles.english: It's our never-ending lu-la-la Miracle Sing Time

subtitles.original: 歌って歌って愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing, it's the absolute best way to express my love!

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも微妙な歌詞でも

subtitles.original: どうしようオートマティックに決められてる時間割じゃ
subtitles.english: What can we do, we can't follow this time table

subtitles.original: 追っつかないの
subtitles.english: That's been decided for us automatically

subtitles.original: 夢無限したいこと怒涛廊下もダッシュで集まるよ
subtitles.english: Billowing waves of us infinite dreamers dash out and assemble in the hallway

subtitles.original: お行儀悪かったらsorry!
subtitles.english: Sorry if my manners are bad!

subtitles.english: But don't mind how I look

subtitles.original: どっぷりハマっちゃうplayキラリって もしやこれが青春

subtitles.original: ever ever... Forever Shine
subtitles.english: ever ever... Forever Shine

subtitles.original: ほんとに大好きっ!!
subtitles.english: I really love you!!

subtitles.original: テンション上昇ルララPowerful Gig Time
subtitles.english: It's a tension-rising lu-la-la Powerful Gig Time

subtitles.original: アレッ!?って言われても ミス連発でも

subtitles.english: I want to set free my boiling bravery

subtitles.english: I'm always so happy, it's the way "now" feels

subtitles.original: 生きろ乙女本能で、裸の
subtitles.english: Live on, fair maidens, with your bare instincts
